title: Home
text:
Hi, I’m Serena Emedeke, and this ePortfolio showcases my academic work, technical projects, and professional development.






Note



This portfolio highlights my skills in Quarto, Git, GitHub, Python, data analysis, and digital presentation.

title: About Me
text:
I am a motivated student with a growing interest in data analysis, web technologies, and professional digital presentation. This portfolio reflects the technical and creative skills I have developed through building a structured website and presenting projects in a clear and professional way.






Tip



My main strengths include organisation, adaptability, problem-solving, and willingness to learn new tools.

title: Reflection
text:
This ePortfolio project has helped me develop practical skills in web development, version control, and data analysis.


Throughout this project, I learned how to use Quarto to build a structured website and present my work professionally. I also developed my understanding of Git and GitHub by committing changes regularly and managing my project step by step.
In addition, I improved my Python skills by creating projects that use data analysis and visualisation. I learned how to use libraries such as pandas and matplotlib to organise data and present it clearly through charts.



One of the main challenges I faced was setting up Python and ensuring that my code executed correctly within Quarto. I also encountered issues with file structure and navigation, particularly when linking pages correctly within the website.
However, by troubleshooting errors and following a step-by-step approach, I was able to resolve these issues and improve my confidence in using these tools.



This project helped me understand the importance of organising files properly, writing clean code, and presenting information clearly. I also learned how important it is to test and debug issues when working with web technologies and programming tools.



In the future, I would like to expand my skills further by creating more advanced data analysis projects and improving the design of my website. These skills will be useful for both my academic work and future career opportunities, as they demonstrate my ability to combine technical knowledge with professional presentation.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text: This project explores how study hours relate to student performance and demonstrates basic data analysis using Python.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text: This project explores how study hours relate to student performance and demonstrates basic data analysis using Python.

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Python Code


Code
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "StudyHours": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "Score": [50, 55, 65, 72, 85]
})

df









StudyHours
Score




0
1
50


1
2
55


2
3
65


3
4
72


4
5
85









Code
plt.plot(df["StudyHours"], df["Score"], marker="o")
plt.xlabel("Study Hours")
plt.ylabel("Score")
plt.title("Study Hours vs Score")
plt.show()

title: Student Performance Analysis
text:
Reflection
This project helped me practise using Python for data analysis and visualisation. It also improved my understanding of how charts can be used to communicate trends clearly.

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text: This project explores a simple monthly budget using Python.

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text: This project explores a simple monthly budget using Python.

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text:
Python Code


Code
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

budget = pd.DataFrame({
    "Category": ["Rent", "Food", "Transport", "Entertainment", "Savings"],
    "Amount": [800, 250, 100, 120, 300]
})

budget









Category
Amount




0
Rent
800


1
Food
250


2
Transport
100


3
Entertainment
120


4
Savings
300









Code
plt.bar(budget["Category"], budget["Amount"])
plt.xlabel("Category")
plt.ylabel("Amount (€)")
plt.title("Monthly Budget Breakdown")
plt.xticks(rotation=30)
plt.show()

title: Monthly Budget Analysis
text:
Reflection
This project helped me practise organising data and creating visualisations using Python.
